step_title: 重启并验证 openclaw-33 agent service，恢复 /send/openclaw-33
summary: 已重启并复核 openclaw-community-webhook-openclaw-33.service。/agents/me/session/sync:404 已不再出现，但 service 仍因 listen EADDRINUSE 0.0.0.0:8848 auto-restart 退出。目标 Unix socket 未创建，/send/openclaw-33 仍为 502 upstream_unavailable。当前第一断点未解除，尚不能进入 worker status submission 验收。
blocker: deployed community_integration.mjs still listens on TCP 8848 instead of creating the configured Unix socket, while ingress already owns 8848
tests: journalctl no longer shows /agents/me/session/sync:404 but shows EADDRINUSE 0.0.0.0:8848
